function.message: No recorded message from Juniper was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Performed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, resolved entity via canonical cast record, then exhaustively read every channel transcript file as instructed by task hint.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/juniper.md` identifies target alias as `juniper`. Across all transcripts in `60_outbox/channels/*.md`, message author fields and author_id fields never attribute any message to Juniper/juniper; two channels explicitly contain no messages.
